title: Principal Radiologist at Fortis Healthcare Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Fortis Healthcare Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Radiologist to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Fortis Healthcare Global Group:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare Global Group!
